title: Foi1y Pack | 1.7.10 Legends Mod Resource Pack
description: A Resourcepack for the Legends Mod
body:
Just a Resourcepack for the 1.7.10 Legends mod, Adds in Homelander, God Fall Superman, Flash Point Batman, Rebirth Batman, Red Death, Godspeed, Frick Cancer Deadpool, Soldier Boy, Comics Dark Knight Batman, First Apperance Batman, Omni Man, Batman Beyond and More

![Suit Showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/28fe871fc5085dd7143439cf89720c0bf73b969a.png)
